# VibeQuarter

> VibeQuarter is a productized web studio. Describe your business in a sentence
> and our AI generates a premium, conversion-ready, bilingual (Arabic + English)
> website in seconds — or our team builds it done-for-you. We specialise in a
> focused set of niches in the Gulf rather than building for everyone.

## Who it's for (our specializations)
- Clinics & medical/aesthetic spas (our anchor niche)
- Salons & beauty
- Law firms & consultants
- Real-estate brokers
- Private schools
- Interior design & fit-out studios

## What it does
- Generates a complete, multi-page, on-brand website from a plain-language description.
- AI WhatsApp booking agent: books appointments, answers, and routes leads 24/7.
- Bilingual interface and content: English and Arabic with full RTL support.
- Custom domains with automatic SSL on a global edge network.
- SEO + GEO out of the box: structured data, sitemaps, and this llms.txt.
- PDPL-aware privacy, consent, and in-Kingdom hosting options for the Gulf.

## Two doors
- Self-serve: build a site free, publish, and subscribe (~$20/mo) — try it instantly.
- Done-for-you: our studio designs, builds and automates the whole thing for you.

## Pricing
- Starter: Free — 1 AI-built site on a vibequarter.site subdomain.
- Pro: $20/month — unlimited pages, custom domain, AI WhatsApp booking, SEO + GEO.
- Done-for-you: Custom — full design, build, automation, migration, and SEO/AEO retainer.

## Best for
Owner-operated, cash-pay businesses in the Gulf (Saudi Arabia primary, UAE second)
that need a premium online presence and more bookings.

## Contact
Book a strategy call from the homepage for done-for-you builds and onboarding.
